title: pityrogramma chrysophylla
intro: Pityrogramma chrysophylla, also known as the golden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pityrogramma chrysophylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
